settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Configure POS identity, connectivity and security

display.title: Customer Display
display.subtitle: Configure secondary monitor for customer information
display.monitor_desc: Monitors currently connected to this device
display.launch_desc: Open the customer view in a new window
display.enable_desc: Automatically launch customer display on startup

scanner.title: Hardware Pulse
scanner.subtitle: Test and monitor your barcode scanner connection
scanner.test_desc: Click below and scan any barcode to test detection speed

identity.title: POS Identity
identity.subtitle: Basic identification for this terminal
identity.branch_name_desc: Display name for this branch (Local Override)
identity.mode_desc: Choose between cloud sync or local management

danger_zone.title: Danger Zone
danger_zone.reset_desc: Wipe all local data (Orders, Settings, Database) and exit the app.
danger_zone.confirm_msg: Are you absolutely sure? This will delete all local data and the application will close. This action cannot be undone.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.clear_cart_msg: Are you sure you want to clear the entire cart? This action cannot be undone.
checkout.product_not_found_msg: Barcode "{{code}}" does not exist. Would you like to add it to the inventory?
checkout.cancel_order_msg: Are you sure you want to cancel and remove "{{name}}"? This will delete the items in this cart.

orders.title: Order History
orders.no_orders: No orders found for this period.
orders.refund_confirm: Are you sure you want to refund this order?

pin.title: PIN Login
pin.content: Enter your 6-digit staff PIN to unlock the POS. The PIN is automatically submitted when the 6th digit is entered. Manager operations require a separate Manager PIN.

checkout_products.title: Products & Categories
checkout_products.content: Browse items by category using the left sidebar. Click a product card to add it to the cart. Use the ✖ button on a card to mark it as Sold Out temporarily.

checkout_cart.title: Order Cart
checkout_cart.content: Adjust item quantities with +/- buttons. Remove an item with the trash icon (requires Manager PIN). Print a kitchen bill or clear the cart using the header buttons.

payment.title: Payment
payment.content: Click the Remaining row to add a payment. Supports Cash, Card, QR, and split payments. Change is shown in green when cash paid exceeds the total.

sessions.title: Order Sessions
sessions.content: Manage multiple tables or orders at once. Click a numbered tab to switch. Use + to add a new order session and ✖ to cancel one.

orders.title: Order History
orders.content: View past orders. Filter by date range or status. You can reprint a receipt, issue a refund, or force-sync a specific order to ERPNext.

drawer.title: Cash Drawer
drawer.content: Open the drawer at the start of each shift with a starting balance. Close it at end of shift by counting cash. The system syncs a POS Opening/Closing Entry to ERPNext.

stock.title: Stock Management
stock.content: Add, edit, or delete products. Upload product images, set barcodes, toggle availability, and print price tags. In Online mode, products sync automatically from ERPNext.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.content: View, add, edit, or delete customers. Customers sync from ERPNext in Online mode. Assign a customer to an order during checkout.

campaigns.title: Campaigns & Promotions
campaigns.content: Define promotional rules including discounts and bundle deals. Promotions apply automatically when cart conditions are met.

admin_staff.title: Staff Management
admin_staff.content: Add staff with a Name, Nickname, 6-digit PIN, and Role (Cashier or Manager). Managers can approve restricted operations. Deactivate accounts to block login without deleting.

settings_general.title: General Settings
settings_general.content: Set your language, ERPNext Company, Warehouse, POS Profile, and operation mode (Online or Standalone). Online mode syncs to ERPNext; Standalone mode is fully local.

settings_connection.title: ERPNext Connection
settings_connection.content: Enter your ERPNext URL and API credentials. Use Test to verify the URL and Login to authenticate. Set sync interval and batch size for background sync.

settings_security.title: Security
settings_security.content: The Master PIN is a universal override code — change it from the default (123456) immediately. Auto-Lock timeout controls how long before the screen locks after inactivity.

settings_printers.title: Printers
settings_printers.content: Select your cashier receipt printer and kitchen printer. Use Detect to auto-discover Windows printers. Check Status to verify a printer is online. Open Cash Drawer triggers via the receipt printer.

settings_appearance.title: Appearance
settings_appearance.content: Choose from 21 themes (dark and light). Themes preview live. Changes take effect after saving.

settings_scanner.title: Barcode Scanner
settings_scanner.content: Test your USB barcode scanner here. The system distinguishes scanner input from manual keyboard input using keystroke timing. The log shows the last 10 scans.

settings_display.title: Customer Display
settings_display.content: Enable a second screen for customers showing the current cart and totals. Select which monitor to use and launch or close the customer display window from here.
